home.heroTitle: Find your next property in Abdoun and beyond
home.heroSubtitle: Browse curated listings, connect with trusted agents, and explore premium neighborhoods inspired by platforms like Zillow and Bayut.
home.exclusiveSubtitle: Premium listings available only through Abdoun Real Estate
home.latestSubtitle: Newly listed homes and apartments on the market
home.servicesSubtitle: From buying and selling to property management, our dedicated team supports you at every step.
home.servicesDescription: Tailored solutions for every stage of your property journey.
home.aboutUsContent: It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors
home.footerDescription: Premium real estate agency helping families and investors find exceptional properties across Amman's top neighborhoods.
home.footerStayUpdatedCopy: Subscribe for the latest listings and market insights from Abdoun and beyond.
home.footerCopyright: © {year} Abdoun Real Estate Agency. All rights reserved.

aboutUsPage.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner in Jordanian real estate since 2010
aboutUsPage.storyP1: Founded in the heart of Abdoun, one of Amman's most prestigious neighborhoods, Abdoun Real Estate has grown from a boutique agency into a leading force in the Jordanian property market. Our deep understanding of the local landscape — from the tree-lined avenues of Abdoun to the bustling hills of West Amman — sets us apart.
aboutUsPage.storyP2: We combine regional expertise with global standards, leveraging the latest PropTech innovations to deliver seamless buying, selling, and property management experiences. Every transaction is backed by our commitment to transparency, accuracy, and personalized service.
aboutUsPage.missionText: To empower families and investors with insightful real estate decisions that maximize prosperity, supported by cutting-edge technology and unwavering integrity.
aboutUsPage.visionText: To be the most trusted and innovative real estate platform in the MENA region, setting new benchmarks for transparency, client satisfaction, and digital excellence.

trust.title: Trust
trust.text: We build lasting relationships through honesty and reliability in every interaction.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.text: We embrace cutting-edge technology to deliver exceptional property experiences.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.text: We ensure accuracy and openness at every stage of the real estate journey.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.text: We pursue the highest standards in service, quality, and professional expertise.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.text: We uphold ethical practices and accountability in all our dealings.

community.title: Community
community.text: We invest in the neighborhoods and people we serve, creating lasting value.

aboutUsPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Dream Property?
aboutUsPage.ctaSubtitle: Let our experts guide you through Jordan's premier real estate market.

ourTeamPage.heroSubtitle: Dedicated professionals committed to your real estate success
ourTeamPage.introText: Our team of experienced real estate professionals brings together diverse expertise in property valuation, market analysis, and client relations. With deep knowledge of Amman's neighborhoods and a passion for exceptional service, we're here to guide you at every step.

ceo.name: Ahmad Al-Rashid
ceo.bio: With over 20 years in Jordanian real estate, Ahmad founded Abdoun Real Estate with a vision to bring transparency and innovation to the market. He leads the company's strategic direction and partnerships across the MENA region.

coo.name: Lina Mansour
coo.bio: Lina brings 15 years of operational excellence from international property firms. She oversees day-to-day operations, ensuring our clients receive world-class service at every touchpoint.

agent1.name: Khaled Nasser
agent1.bio: Specializes in luxury villas and residential properties in Abdoun and Deir Ghbar.

agent2.name: Sara Al-Haddad
agent2.bio: Expert in commercial investments, office spaces, and retail properties across Amman.

agent3.name: Omar Tariq
agent3.bio: Focuses on land acquisition and development opportunities in West Amman.

agent4.name: Rania Khalil
agent4.bio: Manages our rental portfolio with a focus on tenant satisfaction and property upkeep.

agent5.name: Fadi Jamal
agent5.bio: Certified appraiser with deep expertise in Amman's real estate market valuations.

agent6.name: Noor Abed
agent6.bio: Ensures seamless communication and exceptional service throughout your property journey.

ourTeamPage.ctaSubtitle: We're always looking for talented real estate professionals to grow with us.
